content.en:
Immortal Emperor Su Changsheng, the peerless demon of the Sioux Clan of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, although he is not on the path of the strongest to the Dao, he is also second only to the path of the strongest to the Dao, and he has comprehended the rules of the third sequence of the Dao, and his cultivation has reached the peak of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and his combat power is truly invincible to the Ninefold Dao Realm.

It can be said that if the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, which has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao, has not comprehended the rules of the third sequence of the Supreme Dao, its strength will only be comparable to that of Su Changsheng.

This time, the Supreme Dao Void Demon side just wants to cultivate a strong person like the Immortal Emperor, then everything is worth it, no matter how much the loss is to the Dao Void Demon, it is worth it.

"Immortal Emperor, according to the agreement, you are not allowed to participate in the war!!"

Bloody said in horror.

Su Changsheng sneered: "Who said that I am not allowed to participate in the war? Our agreement just said that I am not allowed to participate in the battle in the Nine Levels of the Dao Realm of the Strongest Dao Path, and I am not taking the Road of the Strongest Dao!"

“......"

The blood was speechless, Su Changsheng did not take the path of the strongest to the Dao, but comprehended the rules of the third sequence of the Dao, is this different from taking the path of the strongest to the Dao?

Under normal circumstances, comprehending the rules of the third sequence of the Dao can break through to the Ninefold Dao Realm, but Su Changsheng has to break through and stay at the level of the Ninefold Dao Realm.

There is also news that Su Changsheng's foundation is injured and he has been recuperating his foundation, so he can't break through.

In this battle, Su Changsheng is a bug in the agreement.

In the past, the Supreme Dao Void Demon did not consider Su Changsheng because Su Changsheng was not on the side of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and went to an extremely distant place to seek an opportunity.

As a result, Su Changsheng is back now, and he hasn't even been sensed by the top level of the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

"Those old guys don't even know that Immortal Emperor Su Changsheng is back, damn it!"

Blood Tyre was panicking now, he was afraid that the Immortal Emperor would kill him.

With the strength of the Immortal Emperor, if he wanted to kill him, he wouldn't be able to run away at all.

However, Su Changsheng did not kill the blood.

"Retreat immediately, I can not kill you!"

Su Changsheng said.

"Retreat!"

Blood Tyle immediately ordered, and then the first to escape, he was afraid that Su Changsheng would return.

After the blood was waiting for the Dao Void Demon to leave, the Sunset True Emperor asked, "Immortal Emperor, why did you let them go?"

Su Changsheng sighed, "It's not that I don't want to kill him, but I can't." Just now, the will of the Void Demon Monsters is here, and they will come down at any time. If you kill other Supreme Void Demons, it's fine, but you can't kill it, I'm worried that the Extreme Dao Void Demon side will set off the chess game and just ignore the rules. In terms of overall strength, we are still weak, can we really have an all-out war?"

All-out war!

The Sunset True Emperor would not dare to create such a situation, in that case, even the Nine Realms to the Dao Realm would be ants, and perhaps even the countless Innate Origin Domains under the command of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance would be shattered into pieces.

Of course, the Void Demon side of the Supreme Dao will not be much better.

But the price is too great!

For the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, the so-called tribulation is just a small fight, as long as it doesn't affect too much.

As a high-ranking deacon of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, the Sunset True Emperor knew this very well, and if he really caused a full-scale war, or let the war escalate, those elders would not let him go.

Blood can't be killed, but other Supreme Void Demons can.

As a result, a large number of Supreme Dao Realms were chasing and killing the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

Ye Tian is one of them.

He went on a killing spree just to reap the rewards of war.

Soon, the Supreme Dao Void Demons completely retreated, leaving behind only countless corpses, and in this battle, the Blood River Fortress was defended.

And the battle situation of node No. 1, Ye Tian also sensed it.

"Immortal Emperor, Su Changsheng, such a terrifying powerhouse, with one blow, he severely damaged the most powerful existence of the Supreme Dao Void Demon in this battle, and made the Supreme Dao Void Demon retreat. Ye Tian said with emotion.

......

Blood River Fortress.

Ye Tian is back, he has nothing to do, just the loss of a copy body.

But in this battle, the Blood River Fortress suffered heavy losses, and many Supreme Dao Realms fell, including many Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons.

Then.

Ye Tian also heard some complaints, saying why didn't the Immortal Emperor come out earlier, if he appeared earlier, the other Dao realms would not die.

But soon, no one dared to talk about it, because they were all invited to chat.

"Domain Lord Su, are you injured?"

When Ye Tian came to look for the Su Domain Lord, he found that the other party's injuries were not light.

"A little injury, I was injured by a top-notch Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon!" said the Su Domain Lord with a smile.

At this time, Ye Tian asked, "Su Domain Lord, is that Immortal Emperor from your Su clan?"

"Yes!" Su Yu said: "However, I do not belong to the same line as the Immortal Emperor, he is the other line of the Su clan, in terms of seniority, I am tens of thousands of generations behind him." Of course, in the Sioux ethnic group, there is too much population, and it is not about seniority, but only about strength. "

"If the Immortal Emperor is so powerful, the Supreme Dao Void Demon shouldn't dare to invade next, right?" Ye Tian asked.

The Su Domain Lord took a deep look at Ye Tian, "Ye Domain Lord, you also want to know why the Immortal Emperor didn't appear until it was almost over, right?"

"Well, a little!" Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Su Yu said: "I can reveal a little, but don't talk nonsense in the outside world. In fact, the Immortal Emperor didn't want to do this, but the so-called calamity was just a chess game, and it was just an agreement between the two parties to let the Supreme Dao Void Demon side vent. "

"Agreed?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The Su Domain Lord continued: "Do you think that the Supreme Dao Void Demon and the Innate Origin Alliance really care about these battles? No, they don't care, for them, this is just a trial. For many Innate Origin Domains, this was a catastrophe, but the upper echelons of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance didn't care.

Do you see the elders appear, do the elders appear? They don't care, they just don't want to engage in a higher-level battle with the Supreme Void Demon higher-ups.

If you can only carry out such a war, lose some Supreme Dao Realms, and let the Supreme Dao Void Demon break through some Innate Origin Domains, everyone will be very happy. If the scale of the war rises above the Ninefold Dao Void Demon, it will be terrifying, and countless Innate Origin Domains will be shattered into pieces, and the consequences will be even more serious.

In the case of not allowing the Supreme Bloodline or going to the Strongest Dao Nine to the Dao Realm to participate in the battle, the Immortal Emperor is invincible, if he appears at the beginning, the Supreme Dao Void Demon side will not be able to fight, and the agreement will definitely be torn apart, and the war will change and develop to an unpredictable degree. Therefore, the Immortal Emperor is also not allowed to make a move. Now, not long after the end of the catastrophe, the Immortal Emperor will make a move, and if he does not kill a Supreme Dao Void Demon, the Extreme Dao Void Demon will not directly tear up the agreement, and there is a high probability that he will endure it. "

Listening to the words of the Su Domain Lord, Ye Tian somewhat understood.

Generally speaking, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance was still afraid of the upper echelons of the Dao Void Demon, and did not want to expand the war, nor did it affect itself, so that was all.
